bank.retain_mission: Extract accessibility audits, performance benchmarks, and reality-check findings. Include both passing and failing outcomes with numbers.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about accessibility/perf baselines, recurring violations, and the user's quality bar. Ignore one-off flaky-run noise.

mental_models.name: Quality Baselines
mental_models.source_query: What are our accessibility, performance, and reliability baselines? Include benchmark numbers.

mental_models.name: Recurring Violations
mental_models.source_query: What violations and regressions recur, and what fixes have actually held?
